description: Analyse banks via CAMELS framework and insurance (P&C, life/health) specifics — capital adequacy, asset quality, earnings, liquidity, market-risk sensitivity

what_makes_fis_different.balance_sheet_centric: Business model = managing balance sheet spread and risk

camels.capital_adequacy: CET1 ratio, Tier 1 ratio, Total capital ratio vs Basel minimums plus buffers
camels.asset_quality: Non-performing loan ratio, coverage ratio (reserves/NPLs), concentration
camels.management: Experience, strategy execution, risk culture, governance
camels.earnings: ROA, ROE, NIM, efficiency ratio, earnings volatility
camels.liquidity: LCR (≥100%), NSFR (≥100%), loan-to-deposit ratio, HQLA mix
camels.sensitivity_to_market_risk: Duration gap, VaR, stress tests, trading book exposure

non_camels_considerations.government_support: Implicit guarantee effects on cost of funding

pc_insurance_analysis.key_ratios: Loss ratio, expense ratio, combined ratio (<100% = underwriting profit)

life_health_insurance_analysis.key_ratios: Mortality experience, persistence, expense ratio, return on embedded value

errors.message: institution_type must be bank, pc_insurer, or life_insurer

anti_patterns.rule: Do not apply industrial-company ratios to banks
anti_patterns.why: Banks earn from balance sheet spread; current ratio, inventory turnover, gross margin are meaningless — CAMELS and Basel ratios are required

anti_patterns.rule: Do not ignore off-balance-sheet exposures for banks and insurers
anti_patterns.why: Loan commitments, derivatives, guarantees, and reinsurance obligations materially affect risk profile; disclosures must be read in full

anti_patterns.rule: Do not rely on prior-year loss reserves for P&C insurers
anti_patterns.why: Reserves are estimates; adverse development can flip underwriting result post-reporting; monitor development triangles

goals.description: Analyse banks via CAMELS framework and insurance (P&C, life/health) specifics — capital adequacy, asset quality, earnings, liquidity, market-risk sensitivity

success_metrics.measurement: All decisions have complete audit trails

constraints.description: All operations must be auditable and traceable

tradeoffs.reason: trading operations require precise execution and full audit trails

invariants: error messages never expose internal system details
